{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Crawlers
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Crawlers]] are creatures that nest in [[Erin]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The prisoner mentioned a Crawler sighting in the winter of eleven ninety-two.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Winter of eleven ninety-two. Crawler sighting.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
